seo.title: Executive MD Program | Beth Motley, MD
seo.description: High-touch, physician-led health optimization for executives and leaders. Comprehensive assessment, personalized lifestyle protocol, and direct access to Dr. Motley.

hero.headline: Executive MD Program
hero.subheadline: High-touch, physician-led health optimization for leaders who refuse to leave their most important asset to chance.

problem.title: Your Health Deserves the Same Attention as Your Business
problem.intro: You have world-class advisors for your finances, your legal strategy, and your business operations. But when it comes to your health — the foundation everything else depends on — most high-performers settle for annual physicals that catch problems only after they have already started.
problem.body: The Executive MD Program is built for leaders who want more than reactive care. It is a proactive, evidence-based partnership with a physician who understands the unique demands of executive life and has the expertise to optimize your health for sustained performance, energy, and longevity.

included.title: What's Included
included.subtitle: A comprehensive, physician-led health optimization experience

items.title: Comprehensive Health Assessment
items.description: Advanced lab panels, cardiovascular screening, body composition analysis, and a thorough lifestyle evaluation that goes far beyond a standard physical.

items.title: Personalized Lifestyle Protocol
items.description: A tailored plan covering nutrition, exercise, sleep, and stress management — designed around your schedule, preferences, and goals rather than a one-size-fits-all template.

items.title: Direct Physician Access
items.description: Reach Dr. Motley directly via text or email for questions, adjustments, or guidance between visits. No phone trees, no waiting rooms, no gatekeepers.

items.title: Quarterly Health Reviews
items.description: Dedicated, unhurried visits every quarter to review your progress, update labs, refine your protocol, and ensure you stay on the optimal trajectory.

items.title: Executive Health Reports
items.description: Clear, detailed reporting that translates your data into actionable insights. Understand exactly where you stand, what is improving, and what to focus on next.

items.title: Priority Scheduling
items.description: Same-week appointments when you need them. Your time is valuable, and the Executive MD Program is designed to respect it at every step.

whoThisIsFor.title: Who This Is For
whoThisIsFor.subtitle: The Executive MD Program is designed for a specific kind of patient
paragraphs: This program is built for C-suite executives, business owners, physicians, attorneys, and other high-performing professionals who recognize that sustained success requires sustained health.

You may be managing the early signs of metabolic disease, navigating the health impacts of chronic stress, or simply unwilling to accept the standard approach of waiting until something breaks before paying attention. You want a physician who will invest the time to understand your life, your goals, and your risks — and build a plan that keeps you performing at your best for decades.
The Executive MD Program accepts a limited number of patients to ensure every member receives the attention and access they deserve.

items.question: How is the Executive MD Program priced?
items.answer: The Executive MD Program operates on a membership model with an annual fee that covers your comprehensive assessment, quarterly reviews, direct physician access, and all included services. Because this is a premium, high-touch program, it is not billed through insurance. We provide a detailed investment overview during your confidential consultation.

items.question: How much time does this require?
items.answer: Your initial comprehensive assessment takes approximately two to three hours. After that, quarterly reviews are about 60 minutes each. Between visits, communication with Dr. Motley happens on your schedule via text or email. The program is designed to fit into a demanding professional life, not add to it.

items.question: How is this different from concierge medicine?
items.answer: Most concierge medicine practices offer faster access to the same reactive, symptom-based care. The Executive MD Program is fundamentally different: it is proactive, prevention-focused, and built on the science of lifestyle medicine. Dr. Motley does not just manage problems as they arise — she identifies risks early, optimizes your health at every level, and creates a personalized protocol to keep you performing at your best for decades.

items.question: Is my information kept confidential?
items.answer: Absolutely. All health information is protected under HIPAA, and the Executive MD Program adds an additional layer of discretion. Your records are maintained separately, communication channels are private, and we never share your participation in the program with anyone — including employers — without your explicit consent.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Complete the inquiry form below and a member of Dr. Motley's team will reach out within 48 hours to schedule a brief, confidential phone consultation. During that call, we will learn about your goals, answer your questions, and determine whether the program is the right fit. There is no obligation.

ctaForm.title: Request a Confidential Consultation
ctaForm.subtitle: Complete the form below and a member of Dr. Motley's team will reach out within 48 hours to schedule a private phone consultation.
